final_prompt.prompt:
Create a comprehensive UI design system with web Dashboard, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a "经典简约科技" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Dieter Rams / Braun industrial design heritage, 1980s-1990s sci-fi interface tradition (Alien, Blade Runner UI), contemporary glassmorphism / neumorphism trends; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multiple UI components arranged as a design system showcase — web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, controls
Subject: must include all specified UI components: web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, controls
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a high-tech futuristic atmosphere with depth and visual hierarchy — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool tech direction with rich layers — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek tech surface treatment with depth — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the "视觉炫酷、层次丰富、科技感极强" direction — visual impact, layered depth, strong tech feel
Avoid:
